title: doellingeria elegans
intro: Doellingeria elegans, also known as White Tansy or Tall Tansy, is a perennial plant in the sunflower family native to eastern North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Doellingeria elegans include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to combat bacterial and fungal infections. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
